raw_consumer_statement: Original Citi credit card hit with fraudulent charges. Citi reissues card, but before I even active it, Citi advises that the replacement card has been hit with fraudulent charges. They issued a second card, and then a third card, which has now been hit with a fraudulent charge as well. Feels like this is an internal Citi issue...? How else could we have been hit with fraudulent charges before the card was even activated? How could three replacement cards be hacked inside of one month? Citi makes it next to impossible to get answers. I spent a good XXXX hours on this, and now the 3rd placement has been compromised and needs replaced. A lot of time spent with no answers on how this keeps happening.
